sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59043" key="korake/ws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορακ-έως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ω</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n59043.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κορώνεως</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
